title: SQBubliks: Restart
description: A reboot of vanilla survival, but with mods, travel, new structures, lots of mechanics, and magic!
body:
![SQBUBLIKS RESTART](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30fc822ad46ca5733ecfa5c936c9b02ddd687e1b.png)

## **SQBubliks: Restart** is a unique modpack for Minecraft that reimagines classic vanilla survival! 🗺️

✨ **What’s inside:**

- 🔄 Fully optimized gameplay without performance loss
- 🗺️ Enhanced travel system with new world exploration opportunities
- 🏰 Unique structures not found in the vanilla version
- 🎲 Diverse game mechanics enriching the survival experience
- 🧙‍♂️ Magic system adding depth to gameplay
- 🤝 Perfect compatibility for playing with friends

🏆 **Key advantages:**

- 🎮 Preservation of the vanilla game spirit
- 👥 Ability to play with friends through integrated voice chat
- 🛠️ All mods are carefully selected and optimized

**🎯 This build is perfect for both solo play and shared adventures with friends, offering a fresh take on classic survival in the world of Minecraft!**

Join the adventure now! 🎮✨
